list.name: instance
list.label: Instance
list.description: Monitored SQL Server instance - one MSSQL datasource per instance. Type to search.

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT
    event_date = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.event_date),
    d.database_name,
    server_name = d.ServerName,
    d.deadlock_type,
    d.spid,
    d.deadlock_group,
    d.status,
    d.isolation_level,
    d.owner_mode,
    d.waiter_mode,
    d.lock_mode,
    d.transaction_count,
    wait_ms = d.wait_time,
    d.wait_resource,
    d.priority,
    d.log_used,
    d.login_name,
    d.host_name,
    d.client_app,
    last_tran_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_tran_started),
    last_batch_started = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_batch_started),
    last_batch_completed = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.last_batch_completed),
    d.transaction_name,
    d.owner_waiter_type,
    d.owner_activity,
    d.owner_waiter_activity,
    d.owner_merging,
    d.owner_spilling,
    d.owner_waiting_to_close,
    d.waiter_waiter_type,
    d.waiter_owner_activity,
    d.waiter_waiter_activity,
    d.waiter_merging,
    d.waiter_spilling,
    d.waiter_waiting_to_close,
    d.client_option_1,
    d.client_option_2,
    query = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.query),
    object_names = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.object_names)
FROM collect.deadlocks AS d
WHERE d.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND d.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND (
${deadlock_id:sqlstring} = '*'
OR ${deadlock_id:sqlstring} = ''
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM collect.deadlocks AS dl
    WHERE dl.deadlock_id = TRY_CAST(${deadlock_id:sqlstring} AS bigint)
        AND dl.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND dl.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND dl.event_date = d.event_date
        AND dl.database_name = d.database_name
        AND (
            (dl.deadlock_graph IS NULL AND d.deadlock_graph IS NULL)
            OR HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONVERT(nvarchar(max), dl.deadlock_graph))
                = HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.deadlock_graph))
        )
))
ORDER BY d.event_date DESC;

panels.title: Deadlock graph (XDL)

targets.rawSql:
SET TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;

SELECT TOP (1)
    event_date = DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETDATE(), GETUTCDATE()), d.event_date),
    d.database_name,
    d.deadlock_group,
    deadlock_graph_xdl = CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.deadlock_graph)
FROM collect.deadlocks AS d
WHERE d.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND d.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
    AND (
${deadlock_id:sqlstring} = '*'
OR ${deadlock_id:sqlstring} = ''
OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM collect.deadlocks AS dl
    WHERE dl.deadlock_id = TRY_CAST(${deadlock_id:sqlstring} AS bigint)
        AND dl.collection_time >= DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeFrom())) AND dl.collection_time < DATEADD(MINUTE, DATEDIFF(MINUTE, GETUTCDATE(), GETDATE()), CONVERT(datetime2, $__timeTo()))
        AND dl.event_date = d.event_date
        AND dl.database_name = d.database_name
        AND (
            (dl.deadlock_graph IS NULL AND d.deadlock_graph IS NULL)
            OR HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONVERT(nvarchar(max), dl.deadlock_graph))
                = HASHBYTES('SHA2_256', CONVERT(nvarchar(max), d.deadlock_graph))
        )
))
    AND d.deadlock_graph IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY d.event_date DESC;

panels.description: Full XDL for this deadlock event. To export: click the panel menu (three dots, top-right) -> Inspect -> Data -> Download CSV. The deadlock_graph_xdl column contains the complete XML. Save the cell content with a .xdl extension and open in SSMS.
